title: Tether Gives Drift $147 Million to Help Address Crypto Hack
snippet: Following a cyberattack, Drift Protocol is relaunching with Tether’s USDT stablecoin as its settlement layer. title: Why Australia’s $17B crypto opportunity depends on regulation
snippet: Australia’s A$24B digital asset opportunity hinges on regulation. Clear rules could drive tokenized markets, faster payments and institutional investment.
